text: Assistant: Yes, it's explicitly passed through. `tmux/launch.rs:68` loops over `["TENEX_EDGE_HOME", "TENEX_CONFIG", "TENEX_EDGE_BIN"]` and forwards each one that's set in the parent environment into the new tmux session via `env` — so the spawned agent and all its harness hook calls will see the same `TENEX_EDGE_HOME` you launched with.
